# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: your-registry/your-web-app:v1.0.0 # Replace with your web app image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080 # Adjust to your application's port
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached.default.svc.cluster.local # Assuming default namespace, adjust if needed
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz # Adjust to your app's health endpoint
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 20
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready # Adjust to your app's readiness endpoint
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 1 # Can be scaled up for high availability and capacity
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6.26-alpine # Using a specific stable version
        args: ["-m", "64"] # Allocate 64MB of memory for Memcached, adjust as needed
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "100Mi"
            cpu: "50m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11211
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11211
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-worker
  labels:
    app: background-worker
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-worker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: your-registry/your-worker-app:v1.0.0 # Replace with your worker app image
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached.default.svc.cluster.local # Assuming default namespace, adjust if needed
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "300m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  type: ClusterIP # Internal service only, not exposed outside the cluster
